/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/torq.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/IO/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/IO/keyboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/IO/mouse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/IO/screen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/generate_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/graphics/material.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/graphics/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/graphics/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/graphics/models/cube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/graphics/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/graphics/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/resources/chunk_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/resources/chunk_mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/resources/chunk_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/resources/chunk_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/resources/region_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/resources/resource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/resources/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/torq.dir/src/worldgen/worldgen.cpp.o -o ../torq   -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 lib/glad/libglad.a lib/stb_image/libstb_image.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so lib/noise/libnoise.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
